title: Recovery Keys · Clean UI · Friends System

entries.text: Password recovery with QR code & backup key — never get locked out again
Complete friends system: send, accept, remove, and manage friend requests
Clean minimal header: @username · avatar · ☰ hamburger only
Changelog system: see what changed on every new version
What's New modal fetches updates live from the repo
All navigation options moved inside the profile dropdown
Loading progress bars on every async operation with milestone labels
Enter-key support flows through login, register, and recovery forms
Smart friend hover-card shows live state: Friends / Pending / Accept
DM / Closet list now opens the correct conversation on tap
Friend-request badge refreshes after accepting a request
Room browser loading and empty states now display correctly
